name: Information Triage
description: Process high-volume feeds rapidly by classifying items on signal strength × relevance to route attention where it creates most value.

name: Weak Signal Detection
description: Identify early-stage indicators of emerging trends by monitoring anomalous patterns at the periphery of mainstream discourse.

name: Progressive Distillation
description: Compress source material through staged passes — capture → bold → extract → implication → connect — so knowledge becomes more actionable each time.

name: Cross-Domain Synthesis
description: Strip domain-specific language to find transferable mechanisms, then apply source-domain solutions to target-domain problems.

name: Intelligence Briefing Craft
description: Write actionable briefings using key-judgment-first structure, explicit confidence levels, and implication framing from intelligence tradecraft.

name: Hacker News Signal Extraction
description: Read HN front page, Ask HN, and Show HN using comment-section quality, score/comment ratios, and temporal patterns to distinguish insight from noise.

name: GitHub Trending Analysis
description: Identify genuinely emerging open-source projects from GitHub Trending by reading stars/forks ratio, repository age, and cross-source confirmation signals.

name: Web Search — Query Formulation
description: Design progressively constrained search queries and interpret result quality using operator toolkit, domain authority signals, and engine-switching heuristics.

name: Arxiv Search — Explorer Feed Strategy
description: Configure arxiv category feeds, rapidly assess paper quality from title/abstract patterns, and layer by recency for directional vs. structural trend signals.

name: Reddit Hot Posts — Signal Extraction
description: Select high-signal subreddits, read comment-section patterns, and use upvote/comment ratios to extract community sentiment and fast-breaking developments.
